raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is directly on top of box_1 (blocking box_1's top). The left and right sides of box_2 are accessible and there is sufficient clearance above for lifting without scraping box_1 or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors from the sides and lifted clear of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (right side, clear area away from box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held above the tabletop and a stable, obstacle-free area on the right side of the table is available for placement.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the right side of the table and released; box_1's top becomes accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is no longer blocked from above by box_2. The left and right sides and front of box_1 are accessible, and there is enough vertical clearance to lift it without colliding with box_2 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted off the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is directly on top of box_1 (blocking box_1's top). The left and right sides of box_2 are accessible and there is sufficient clearance above for lifting without scraping box_1 or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors from the sides and lifted clear of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table (right side, clear area away from box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held above the tabletop and a stable, obstacle-free area on the right side of the table is available for placement.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the right side of the table and released; box_1's top becomes accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is no longer blocked from above by box_2. The left and right sides and front of box_1 are accessible, and there is enough vertical clearance to lift it without colliding with box_2 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted off the table.
